name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_Code
title: R5: A code that this product is known by, within some formal terminology (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.code` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.code` 0..* `Coding`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.code` 0..* `Coding`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.code` 0..* `Coding`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.code` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: A code that this product is known by, within some formal terminology (new)
element.comment:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.code` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: A code that this product is known by, within some formal terminology
element.definition: A code that this product is known by, usually within some formal terminology, perhaps assigned by a third party (i.e. not the manufacturer or regulator). Products (types of medications) tend to be known by identifiers during development and within regulatory process. However when they are prescribed they tend to be identified by codes. The same product may be have multiple codes, applied to it by multiple organizations.
